acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors after adding claude-cli.ts
pipeline-config.schema.json is valid JSON and parseable; pipeline/config.json validates against it
acceptance_criteria.verify: node -e "const Ajv = require('ajv'); const ajv = new Ajv(); const schema = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('src/schemas/pipeline-config.schema.json','utf8')); const config = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('pipeline/config.json','utf8')); const valid = ajv.validate(schema, config); if (!valid) { console.error(ajv.errors); process.exit(1); }"

acceptance_criteria.description: claude-cli.ts implements execSync invocation with correct flags, timeout handling, retry logic, inter-call delay, and ajv double-validation
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) claude-cli.ts exports a function that invokes `claude -p` via child_process.execSync with flags --output-format json, --json-schema, and --max-turns. (2) Short 429 handling: retries with exponential backoff up to max_retries_on_short_429 (default 3) with backoff_multiplier (default 2) when retry-after <= 60s. (3) Long 429 handling: aborts immediately when retry-after > 60s. (4) Inter-call delay of delay_between_calls_ms (default 2000ms) enforced between consecutive calls. (5) Returned JSON is parsed and validated with ajv against the provided schema. (6) All config values have compiled-in defaults and are optionally overridden from pipeline/config.json. (7) pipeline-config.schema.json uses Draft-07 with all fields optional, covering refinement.max_iterations, refinement.convergence_threshold, timeouts.ring1_check_seconds, timeouts.ring2_check_seconds, timeouts.fix_call_seconds, claude_cli.max_retries_on_short_429, claude_cli.backoff_multiplier, claude_cli.delay_between_calls_ms. PASS if all seven hold; FAIL if any is missing.
